## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Tyler (GrowthX) and Bo (RTP Ventures) to discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX: AI-driven content agency, $10M+ ARR, 70+ clients, raised Series A ($12M), targeting Series B](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [RTP Global: $1B fund (4th), early-stage focus (pre-seed to Series A), $1-15M checks, global presence](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [GrowthX ideal clients: Companies with some domain authority, belief in organic growth via content](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Pricing: $20K strategy sprint (8 weeks), $12K/mo growth execution (12 months) for Series A startups](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

## Topics

### RTP Global Overview

  - [Global VC firm: 27+ years, offices in 8 cities (NY, SF, London, Paris, Bangalore, Dubai, Amsterdam, Israel)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Fund 4: $1B vehicle, \>50% reserved for follow-on investments](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Focus: Pre-seed to Series A, $1-15M initial checks](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Success story: Datadog (1st institutional investor, 2nd largest shareholder at IPO)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Bo's role: Early-stage investor since Nov 2021, based in NYC](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

### GrowthX Service Overview

  - ["Services as software": Blending quality services with AI/software speed/scalability](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [End-to-end partner: Content strategy (SEO/GEO) → creation → publishing → LLM tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [AI-powered internal platform with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Team includes ex-TechCrunch CCO, G2.com editors, TripAdvisor/Fanatics SEO leads](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [10M+ ARR, 70+ clients, Series A raised ($12M), Series B in progress](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

### GrowthX Workflow & Technology

  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint, 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [AI workflows built on internal platform, expert-monitored at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Comprehensive persona/ICP research feeds AI content generation](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Multi-step process: Brief → Research → Draft → Fact-check → Cross-link → SEO meta](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Proprietary workflow engine leveraging various APIs for deep research/validation](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Client Results & Use Cases

  - [Traffic increases: 5-10x (AugmentCode), 24x (DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Revenue impact: 4x increase (DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Ramp.com examples: Business expense classifier, vendor directory leveraging proprietary data](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Pricing Structure

  - [Strategy Sprint: $20,000 fixed fee (Series A companies)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Growth Execution: Starting at $12,000/month (Series A stage)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Higher-tier options available for expanded services beyond editorial](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bo to keep GrowthX in mind for relevant RTP portfolio companies needing content/growth support](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Tyler to relay Bo's interest in a potential follow-up conversation with Marcel (GrowthX CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Explore possible investment/fundraising discussions between RTP and GrowthX (via Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/xGAi_Ed3HChqfu92kCyWLsqfaQg1Grip?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
